UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the prince's disinterest and boredom with his current suitors, and the fourth cup as a potential new opportunity or distraction.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the regal setting or the rejected suitors, as they may not be the main focus of this card in this orientation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, slow, melancholic, contemplative, ambient, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the dissatisfaction of the King Fisherman Goldfish, his scowl, and the empty opulence surrounding him.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the greedy monarch as this card suggests a feeling of discontent rather than a focus on others' desires.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, percussion, hopeful, uplifting, growing, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Cups card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the offer of a new opportunity, Sleeping Beauty's unnoticed awakening, and the subtle details of her surroundings.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the sleepiness or passiveness of Sleeping Beauty as she is on the brink of change.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Cups card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, slow, contemplative, ethereal, instrumental
